title: The Little Jumping Girls.
content:
Jump jump jump 
    Jump away
    From this town into
    The next, to-day.

    Jump jump jump 
    Jump over the moon;
    Jump all the morning,
    And all the noon.

    Jump jump jump 
    Jump all night;
    Won't our mothers
    Be in a fright?

    Jump jump jump 
    Over the sea;
    What wonderful wonders
    We shall see.

    Jump jump jump 
    And leave behind
    Everything evil
    That we may find.

    Jump jump jump 
    Jump far away;
    And all come home
    Some other day.
meaning:
Kate Greenaway's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Little Jumping Girls."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
